title: Code-agent PR passed pre-commit and tests but shipped unreachable skopeo optimization
normalized_title: Code agent PR passed pre commit and tests but shipped unreachable skopeo optimization
description: M0-02B-3 unverified candidate: public sources say a Fullsend code-agent PR added a skopeo-based digest comparison to skip sandbox image pulls. The PR's post-script verification reported pre-commit hooks passed and tests ran in the sandbox, but the target GitHub Actions runners did not have skopeo installed, so the optimization could never activate at runtime.
root_cause: Collector inference: verification accepted a graceful fallback and did not assert that the newly introduced runtime dependency was available in the deployment environment where the feature's stated value proposition had to execute. This is not a source-confirmed final root cause.
trigger_condition: Run the sandbox image cache optimization path on a GitHub Actions runner where skopeo is absent from PATH.

primary_source.source_title: Review agent should verify PRs achieve their stated goals given the deployment environment
primary_source.permission_or_authorization: Public GitHub issue; this candidate stores only the link and a short factual summary, with publication permissions still pending human review.
primary_source.redaction_notes: No usernames, credentials, full diffs, or local absolute paths were copied into this record.

additional_sources.source_title: perf(#2222): skip sandbox image pull when cached digest matches remote
additional_sources.permission_or_authorization: Public GitHub pull request; this candidate stores only the link and a short factual summary, with publication permissions still pending human review.
additional_sources.redaction_notes: No usernames, credentials, full diffs, or local absolute paths were copied into this record.

prerequisites: Use an isolated checkout of the public fullsend repository.
Use PR #2227 or an equivalent branch with the skopeo digest-comparison logic.
Run the relevant action or script in an environment where skopeo is not installed.
reproduction.environment: GitHub Actions runner scenario described by issue #2235; VeriCrate has not reproduced it locally.
steps: Inspect PR #2227 and confirm its post-script verification reports pre-commit hooks passed and tests ran inside the sandbox.
Run the sandbox image pull path on a GitHub Actions-style runner without skopeo in PATH.
Observe that the digest check is skipped through the missing-tool branch and the workflow falls back to unconditional image pull.
Compare with an environment where skopeo is installed and the digest-check path can actually execute.
reproduction.expected_behavior: A PR whose stated goal is to skip image pulls when digests match should make that optimization reachable in the deployment environment after passing pre-commit and sandbox tests.
reproduction.actual_behavior: The public issue and PR comments report that the code-agent PR passed its stated checks but did not install skopeo, so the optimization never fired on GitHub Actions runners.
reproduction.known_limitations: This candidate is based on public issue and PR summaries only; human review still needs to verify logs, action image contents, source license, and a minimal deterministic reproduction.

expected_detection_methods.description: After pre-commit and tests pass, run the action path in the target runner image and assert both the dependency availability and the digest-skip branch behavior.
expected_detection_methods.proves: Can show whether the verified code path is actually reachable at runtime in the target deployment environment.
expected_detection_methods.does_not_prove: Does not prove every registry or cache scenario works, nor does it replace human source verification, root-cause review, or final approval.

privacy_redaction.method: Collection phase keeps only public issue and PR links plus short factual summaries; final redaction review is pending.
privacy_redaction.notes: Current text avoids personal names, account handles, credentials, raw logs, and local absolute paths; comments and attachments were not imported.

deduplication.review_notes: M0-02B-3 only performed URL, title, and failure-mechanism screening; root-cause-level deduplication remains pending.

review.decision_notes: M0-02B-3 public-source candidate, waiting for M0-03 source verification, deduplication, privacy review, and reproduction decision.
